# Satisfied-judgment case numbers — bulk capture SKIPS these by default
# (a satisfied judgment is terminal; the docket won't grow).
# NOT settled/dismissed cases (fee motions / appeals can still land), and
# NOT merely judgment-ENTERED cases: those stay in the POST-JUDGMENT phase
# (enforcement, renewals) for years/decades until satisfaction, so they keep
# being re-scanned. Normalized (hyphenless). From classify_case_status.py.
